div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p: No

span.p: Pass

span.p: Independently recompute aggregates, statistics, figures, and evidence IDs

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gate 6
Level 3 fairness, completeness, and statistical evidence

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Reconstruct approvals, resources, failed-run retention, and protected-evidence flow

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gate 7
Level 4 governance and auditability

div.style: color: rgb(69, 26, 3) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Human Claim Gate
approve conclusions, limits, negative results, and disclosures

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Reproducible code, experiment artifacts, and bounded scientific claims

div.style: color: rgb(23, 37, 84) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Human returns to Gate 5 to rerun, weaken the claim, or terminate

div.style: color: rgb(69, 10, 10) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Block release
preserve evidence and record the governance event

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5;

span.p:
Gate 5
Run matrix and resources authorized

div.style: color: rgb(23, 37, 84) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Agent runs only approved baselines, ablations, seeds, and searches

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Continuously record the run ledger, event log, resources, and failed runs

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Must data, model, loss, metric, budget, or hypothesis change?

div.style: color: rgb(69, 10, 10) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Stop adaptive work
submit evidence and return to Gate 1
